_instructions: Work experience timeline. 'logo' uses simpleicons.org or Google's favicon service.
subtitle: Building modern data platforms and analytics solutions

experiences.title: Analytics Engineer
responsibilities: Architected and developed Analytics Engineering solutions using dbt, Snowflake, SQL, Python, and Apache Airflow to support financial reporting, lending analytics, operational reporting, and executive dashboards.
Designed and implemented scalable staging, intermediate, and mart-layer dbt models following medallion or Kimball architecture based on requirement.
Developed reusable dbt macros, testing frameworks, documentation, and lineage processes to improve data quality and governance.
Built analytics-ready datasets supporting loan performance analysis, customer acquisition metrics, funding operations, revenue reporting, and KPI tracking.
Designed dimensional data models including fact and dimension tables supporting business intelligence and self-service analytics.
Partnered with finance, operations, and executive stakeholders to translate business requirements into scalable analytical solutions.
Implemented automated testing, reconciliation, and validation frameworks improving trust in business-critical reporting.
Optimized Snowflake warehouse performance through query tuning, clustering, and efficient transformation strategies.
Developed Power BI dashboards enabling executive teams to monitor operational and financial performance.
Built AI-ready datasets supporting predictive analytics, customer intelligence, and machine learning initiatives.
Utilized AWS services including S3, Glue, Lambda, CloudWatch, and Athena to support cloud-based analytics infrastructure.

experiences.title: Data Engineer
responsibilities: Developed enterprise-scale ETL and ELT pipelines using Python, PySpark, Databricks, Kafka, Snowflake, Airflow, and AWS.
Built scalable ingestion frameworks processing customer, transaction, compliance, risk, and operational datasets.
Designed and implemented dimensional data models and data marts supporting enterprise reporting and advanced analytics.
Developed Change Data Capture (CDC) pipelines using Kafka and Airflow to improve reporting freshness and data availability.
Built Spark-based transformation frameworks processing millions of financial records across multiple business domains.
Implemented automated data quality monitoring, reconciliation, validation, and auditing processes.
Optimized Snowflake and Amazon Redshift workloads improving performance and reducing cloud costs.
Developed scalable data solutions supporting business intelligence, compliance reporting, and customer analytics.
Collaborated with analysts, data scientists, and business stakeholders to deliver trusted analytics assets.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Docker, Jenkins, Terraform, GitHub Actions, and Git.
Supported machine learning and predictive analytics initiatives through feature engineering and curated datasets.
Leveraged AWS services including S3, Glue, Lambda, Redshift, Athena, and CloudWatch to build and maintain cloud-native data platforms.

experiences.title: Junior Data Engineer
responsibilities: Developed Python and SQL-based ETL pipelines supporting SaaS product analytics and operational reporting.
Built automated Apache Airflow workflows for ingestion, transformation, scheduling, and monitoring of enterprise datasets.
Processed structured and semi-structured datasets using SQL and PySpark to support reporting and analytics initiatives.
Utilized Azure Data Factory (ADF) to orchestrate ETL workflows and automate data movement across systems.
Developed and maintained datasets within Azure SQL Database and Azure Data Lake Storage (ADLS).
Built reporting datasets consumed by BI teams for executive dashboards and KPI reporting.
Implemented data validation checks, schema enforcement rules, and reconciliation processes to improve data reliability.
Optimized SQL queries and reporting processes improving dashboard performance and refresh times.
Collaborated with analysts, product teams, and business users to deliver analytics-ready datasets.
Participated in Agile development, testing, deployment, and production support activities.
